question: Give me the details of all the services that have interacted with the channel with detail "15 ij".
sql: SELECT Customer_Interactions.Service_ID, Services.Service_Details FROM Customer_Interactions JOIN Services ON Customer_Interactions.Service_ID = Services.Service_ID WHERE Customer_Interactions.Channel_ID = (SELECT Channel_ID FROM Channels WHERE Channel_Details = '15 ij')

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取与特定渠道互动的服务信息，而SQL描述中过滤条件直接作用于Services_and_Channels_Details字段，可能无法准确区分服务与渠道的关联关系，且未明确表结构中该字段的含义（如是否为联合字段或包含分隔符的复合值）
